concepts.title: vLLM (paged attention, continuous batching)
concepts.hook: Production standard; PagedAttention reduces KV cache fragmentation; continuous batching high throughput.

concepts.title: TensorRT-LLM (NVIDIA's compiled inference)
concepts.hook: Maximum performance on NVIDIA GPUs; 28-min compilation cost; best for stable models.

concepts.title: SGLang and RadixAttention
concepts.hook: Shared prefix optimization; ideal for multi-turn and structured generation.

concepts.title: Ollama for local inference
concepts.hook: Simplified model serving; good for prototyping on CPU/GPU.

concepts.title: Other frameworks: MLC LLM, LM Studio, llama.cpp
Token batching and dynamic batching
concepts.hook: Batch requests; balance latency and throughput.

concepts.title: Speculative decoding
concepts.hook: Draft model generates tokens; verify with large model; amortizes large model cost.

concepts.title: Prompt caching and KV cache reuse
concepts.hook: Cache prompt embeddings/KV for repeated queries; reduces latency and cost.

concepts.title: Beam search vs greedy decoding
concepts.hook: Greedy: fast, high variance; beam: slower, better quality.

concepts.title: Structured generation and constrained decoding
concepts.hook: Enforce output format (JSON, regex); reduces invalid outputs.

concepts.title: Post-training quantization (PTQ) vs quantization-aware training (QAT)
concepts.hook: PTQ: no retraining; QAT: slight accuracy loss but better.

concepts.title: INT8 and INT4 quantization
concepts.hook: INT8: minimal overhead; INT4: 75% memory reduction but accuracy risk.

concepts.title: Bfloat16 and mixed precision
concepts.hook: Bfloat16 faster than float32 on modern GPUs; reduced precision doesn't hurt much.

concepts.title: GPTQ, AWQ, GGUF quantization formats
concepts.hook: Post-training quantization specific formats; tradeoff inference speed vs model size.

concepts.title: Quantization-aware training with learned scaling
concepts.hook: Quantization scales learned during training; better accuracy.

concepts.title: Data parallelism for inference
concepts.hook: Replicate model; each GPU processes different request; synchronization minimal.

concepts.title: Tensor parallelism (TP)
concepts.hook: Split layers across devices; each device computes part of matmul; reduces latency per token.

concepts.title: Pipeline parallelism (PP)
concepts.hook: Split model layers across devices; temporal pipeline; reduces per-device memory.

concepts.title: Unified serving frameworks (vLLM distributed, TensorRT-LLM multi-GPU)
concepts.hook: TP is standard for LLMs; PP less common.
